modeDescriptions.chat: Ask questions about your study material
modeDescriptions.quiz: Test your knowledge with AI-generated questions
modeDescriptions.suggestCards: Generate new flashcards similar to these

messages.welcome: Hi! I'm your AI study assistant. I have access to all the cards in this study set. How can I help you study?
messages.quizWelcome: Let's test your knowledge! I'll ask you questions based on your flashcards. Ready?
messages.explainWelcome: I can explain any concept from your study set in detail. What would you like to understand better?
messages.keyConceptsWelcome: Let me analyze your study set and identify the key concepts...
messages.suggestCardsWelcome: I can generate new flashcards that fit this set. Tap Generate Cards to start.
messages.emptyState: Start a conversation to get help studying
messages.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
messages.clearChatConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear this conversation?

setup.title: Set up AI Features
setup.description: Configure your AI provider and API key to start using AI-powered study features.

aiSettings.title: AI Integration
aiSettings.description: Configure your AI provider to enable AI-powered study features. Your API key is stored encrypted on your device and never saved on our servers.
aiSettings.modelDescription: Choose which AI model to use
aiSettings.apiKeyDescription: Enter your API key from your provider
aiSettings.testError: Connection failed. Please check your API key.
aiSettings.securityNote: Your API key is encrypted and stored only on this device. It is transmitted securely per-request but never stored on our servers.
